# K-Scale Command Line Interface This is a command line tool for interacting with various services provided by K-Scale Labs. For more information, see the [documentation](https://docs.kscale.dev/pkg/intro). ## Installation ```bash pip install kscale ```

modules.name: kscale
documentation: Defines the common interface for the K-Scale Python API.

documentation: Defines some helper functions for working with artifacts.

functions.name: kscale.cli.cli
documentation: Command line interface for interacting with the K-Scale web API.

modules.name: kscale.web.utils
documentation: Utility functions for interacting with the K-Scale WWW API.

functions.name: kscale.web.utils.get_api_root
documentation:
Returns the base URL for the K-Scale WWW API.

This can be overridden when targetting a different server.

Returns:
    The base URL for the K-Scale WWW API.

functions.name: kscale.web.utils.get_api_key
documentation:
Returns the API key for the K-Scale WWW API.

Returns:
    The API key for the K-Scale WWW API.

functions.name: kscale.web.utils.get_cache_dir
documentation: Returns the cache directory for artifacts.

functions.name: kscale.web.utils.get_artifact_dir
documentation: Returns the directory for a specific artifact.

variables.name: kscale.web.utils.DEFAULT_UPLOAD_TIMEOUT
documentation: 5 minutes

functions.name: kscale.utils.checksum.calculate_sha256
documentation:
Calculate SHA256 checksum and size of a file.

Args:
    file_path: Path to the file

Returns:
    Tuple of (checksum hex string, file size in bytes)
